title: Payment Checkout information of users
excerpt: We’re missing data of users reaching the payment checkout and not purchasing - It would be great to know the account or user to contact them and have them finish the process of purchasing the app with nurturing email (em…

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re missing data of users reaching the payment checkout and not purchasing - It would be great to know the account or user to contact them and have them finish the process of purchasing the app with nurturing email (email and company name)

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @Michaleiba for the request!

Everyone: You can vote for it at the top of the screen!

Cheers,
Matias
